chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI. C.P No. D-1336 of 2022 ____________________________________________________________ Dated Order with signature of Judge. ____________________________________________________________ Direction For orders as to maintainability of Petition. 02.10.2025. Petitioner is present in person. Mr. Jawad Dero, Advocate General, Sindh Mr. K.A Vaswani, Asstt. Advocate General a/w Javed Nabi Khoso, DC South and Siraj Jamali, Deputy Director TMC (South) Mr. Fayaz Memon, Advocate for Respondent No2. Mr. Khurram Ghayasuddin, Advocate for KMC a/w Mr. Abdul Rehman Kamboh, Deputy Director, Anti- Encroachment, KMC. --------------- Counsel for the Respondent No.2 along with Mr. Siraj Jamali, Deputy Director, TMC (South) as well as learned A.G. Sindh along with Deputy Commissioner (South) jointly submit and undertake that the matter of alleged encroachment on Shahra-e- Iraq will be looked into and dealt with in accordance with law and all necessary and appropriate action will be taken so as to ensure that the road and footpaths are kept clear of encroachment. They state further that if any commercial establishments are found to repeatedly be causing encroachment, the same would be sealed and criminal prosecutions initiated. In view of those statements and undertakings, the Petition stands disposed of accordingly. JUDGE JUDGE TariqAli/PS
